titles.title: I know I am not worthy

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I know I am not worthy To come to you my King, I know I am not worthy To come before you and sing, But You in all Your mercy Forgive me, all my sins, I want to thank You Jesus, You are my everything.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: /: You are Jesus the king who died for me, You are Jesus the One who set me free, I want to serve You Jesus, I need your help for that, Please help me to be thankful For now and evermore :/

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I know I am not worthy To come to you my King, I know I am not worthy To come before you and sing, But You in all Your mercy Forgive me, all my sins, I want to thank You Jesus, You are my everything.
